title: AN ACT CONVERTING DOHA GREGORIA MEMORIAL HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF AGOO, PROVINCE OF LA UNION, INTO A NATIONAL HOSPITAL TO BE KNOWN AS DONA GREGORIA NATIONAL HOSPITAL, AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 11774 / 62 OG No. 27, 4749 (July 4, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4331, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING DOHA GREGORIA MEMORIAL HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF AGOO, PROVINCE OF LA UNION, INTO A NATIONAL HOSPITAL TO BE KNOWN AS DONA GREGORIA NATIONAL HOSPITAL, AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Dona Gregoria Memorial Hospital in the Municipality of Agoo, Province of La Union, is hereby converted into a national hospital to be known as Dona Gregoria National Hospital.

SEC. 2. The sum of two hundred thousand pesos is hereby authorized to be appropriated out of any funds in the National Treasury not otherwise appropriated, to carry out the purposes of this Act. Every year thereafter, the said sum must be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
